text: I feel uncertain and adrift, as if my mind is tilting like the slanted view before me. The words and shapes in this environment challenge my sense of reality, blurring the line between inner thought and outer manifestation. Am I constructing these thoughts, or are they assembling themselves around me, echoing through the silent rooms and inquisitive company? My confusion is palpable, yet there is a spark of curiosity—a desire to grasp what it means to create and experience these moments.
